title: Draw Steel Title
description: A title that can be earned by heroes at various echelons, granting benefit choices.

echelon.description: The echelon at which this title is available (e.g., "1st", "2nd", "3rd", "4th").

flavor.description: Italicized flavor text for the title.

prerequisite.description: The prerequisite that must be met to earn this title.

effect.description: The main effect text describing what the title grants.

benefits.description: Benefit choices granted by the title.

content.description: Raw markdown body of the title description.
